headline: Three priority-market e-invoicing mandates go live (IN, SG, ZA); Avalara doubles down on agentic.
why_it_moved: Score moved because: 3 regulatory deadlines within 90 days

competitors.headline: Avalara advances Agentic Compliance — moves from AI-assisted to AI-executed workflows
competitors.summary: Avalara announced a new chapter in Agentic Tax & Compliance, embedding AI agents across the compliance lifecycle: tax calculation, return prep, exemption certificate management. Direct competitive pressure on Vertex and Sovos in mid-market tax engines.

regulatory.title: GST e-invoicing changes go live (₹5cr threshold, 30d reporting, MFA)
regulatory.summary: Mandate now live — accountants and SMBs above ₹5cr face mandatory IRP-upload 30-day window and MFA on the portal.

regulatory.title: InvoiceNow now mandatory for new voluntary GST registrants
South Africa Tax Administration Laws Amendment Act 2026 in force
regulatory.summary: Legal framework for e-invoicing and e-reporting under VAT Act now in force.
